feature1.title: What makes
feature1.desc1: Crimson & Cardinal is produced in Napa Valley, the “Disneyland” of wine lovers.
feature1.desc2: The Oakville Vineyard is located in the heart of the Napa Valley... This unique location allows the hot sun and cool ocean breezes to be the most precious catalyst for each grape, forging the soul of the top worship wine.
feature1.desc3: With love and dedication, Crimson & Cardinal selected, cultivated, and vinified the 2021 vintage of Napa Valley's finest grapes...

feature2.title: Hidden Excellence
feature2.desc1: This wine has the classic characteristics of a rare Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon.
feature2.desc2: Tightly structured, delicate, elegant and smooth.
feature2.desc3: Aged for 24 months in 100% new French oak barrels without any filtration. The barrels are replaced and de-scummed to maximize the richness of the wine and its characteristic flavors.

feature3.title: Brewing for the Elite
feature3.desc: We use hand harvesting and destemming to minimize intervention and allow the true character of the grapes to shine through.
